# Vendored GEPA Code Mode Files

This folder snapshots new GEPA files related to the Code Mode adapter so this repo can:

- Demonstrate and iterate quickly
- Keep a clear contribution bundle for upstream GEPA PRs

Source of truth for contribution remains:

- your GEPA fork checkout

Refresh this snapshot:

```bash
GEPA_SOURCE_DIR=/path/to/gepa ./scripts/sync_gepa_vendor.sh
```
